title: Make Timeline date selection positioning static
excerpt: When selecting a timeline for a task and moving month to month, the arrows to select the months moves depending on the amount of days in the current months displayed. When you’re building out multiple task timelines for …

posts.author: weston (Weston)
posts.cookedHtml: When selecting a timeline for a task and moving month to month, the arrows to select the months moves depending on the amount of days in the current months displayed. When you’re building out multiple task timelines for a project and repeatedly referencing future months, this can get frustrating.
